title: kohleria rubricaulis
intro: Kohleria rubricaulis, also known as the 'Rubber Flower', is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It is a perennial herb native to the tropical forests of Central and South America, and its name comes from the bright red flowers resembling small rubber balls. The medicinal properties of Kohleria rubricaulis include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, and it is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
